content:
@sigil v0 hybrid
G: decide(modular_monolith)
C: staffing:team_of_6 ∧ ops:part_time_DevOps ∧ timeline:"4_months" ∧ data_store:"PostgreSQL"
H: suitable_for_small_team ∧ efficient_for_short_timeline ∧ supports_modular_structure ⇒ prefer(modular_monolith)
P: develop_core_app_with_billing_module → leverage_postgres_for_data_storage → ensure_code_reusability
R: ! scalability_issues_post_launch ∧ ! potential_technical_debt ∧ ! integration_complexity_in_future
A: the_modular_monolith_structure_fits_both_the_team_size_and_timeline_need ∧ it_ensures_initial_delivery_with_growth_in_mind

[AUDIT]
Decision made based on current team capabilities and project constraints.

structured_data.audit: Decision made based on current team capabilities and project constraints.

content:
@sigil v0 hybrid
G: decide(Choosemodular_monolithduetoconstraints.)
C: team_size:6 ∧ part_time_DevOps ∧ single_postgreSQL_db ∧ 4_month_deadline ∧ modest_traffic
H: faster_time_to_market ∧ simpler_dev_and_ops ∧ easy_initial_scalability ⇒ prefer(Choosemodular_monolithduetoconstraints.)
P: develop_core_app_and_billing_together → build_first_release_as_modular_monolith → plan_for_future_split
R: ! complicated_future_refactoring ∧ ! potentiallychallenging_scaling
A: modular_monolith

[AUDIT]
Choose Choosemodular_monolithduetoconstraints. under team_size:6, part_time_DevOps and keep the path to future decomposition open.
